news.t: Pzena Investment Management Enters the Active ETF Space with Launch of Two Exchange-Traded Funds

holdings.infoBox: PZIV is an equity ETF with a total of 64 individual holdings. The top holdings are MINEBEA MITSUMI stock at 3.01%, Compagnie Générale des Établissements Michelin Société en commandite par actions at 2.97%, Murata Manufacturing at 2.95%, Publicis Groupe at 2.92%, and Shell at 2.82%.

overview.description: The Pzena International Value ETF (PZIV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund provides exposure to the international equity market, targeting non-US companies exhibiting value characteristics.  It is an actively managed ETF seeking long-term capital appreciation. PZIV was launched on Mar 31, 2026 and is issued by Pzena.

data.title: Pzena Investment Management Enters the Active ETF Space with Launch of Two Exchange-Traded Funds
data.text: NEW YORK, April 07, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Pzena Investment Management (“Pzena”), a global investment manager specializing in classic value investing, today announced the launch of its first two act...
